subject: fix(current-refinements): include/exclude (algolia/instantsearch-specs#51)
body:
* fix(current-refinements): include/exclude

fixes #48

Basically there's no need for a includedAttributes on clearRefinements for now, since it will be able with transformItems, so this PR supersedes both

* chore: remove includedAttributes
